overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character navigating a dark, atmospheric industrial interior with concrete architecture and neon lighting. The player character approaches and engages in close-quarters combat with a group of enemies in a hazy, multi-level warehouse environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse corridor with burning barrel

events.description: camera rounds the corner revealing hostile NPCs ahead in the main chamber

agents.ego_description: player character with glowing green back implants walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the open area

notable_agents.action: group of hostile enemies standing near a fire source, unaware of approaching player

entered.detail: multi-level concrete staircase with glowing blue neon tube lighting on the upper level
metal barrel with open fire providing orange flickering light
large rectangular overhead light fixture emitting warm orange glow
thick industrial concrete column supporting the upper structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark industrial warehouse corridor with concrete architecture. The camera follows the player character forward past a burning barrel on the left, approaching an open area where a group of hostile NPCs stands near a fire source. Blue neon lights illuminate the upper stairwell structure while an orange ceiling light hangs ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial combat arena with cover crates

events.description: player character engages in close-quarters combat with the hostile group

agents.ego_description: player character fighting enemies with melee attacks, moving dynamically between targets

notable_agents.action: enemy with red hat engaging in combat with the player
enemy falling to the ground after being struck

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in white spray-painted graffiti markings
stacked metal and wooden crates providing cover

segments.scene_description: The player enters the main combat area and engages the hostile group. The environment features graffiti-covered walls and industrial crates for cover. The concrete stairwell structure recedes into the background as the camera focuses on the close-quarters melee combat. One enemy falls to the ground near the right side as the fight intensifies under the orange overhead lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark industrial corridor that opens into a chaotic close-quarters combat zone. It begins by tracking the player character forward past a burning barrel, moving through a concrete warehouse space illuminated by blue neon lights and a single orange ceiling lamp. As the camera advances, the narrow corridor expands into a main combat area where the player engages a group of hostile NPCs amidst graffiti-covered walls and industrial crates. The scene then shifts focus from the surrounding architecture to the intensity of the melee fight, with the concrete stairwell receding into the background as an enemy falls to the ground under the glow of the overhead lighting.
